name: io.github.pvliesdonk/scholar-mcp
title: Scholar MCP Server
description: Scholarly-sources MCP: papers, patents, books, standards — search and cross-reference prior art.

environmentVariables.name: SCHOLAR_MCP_READ_ONLY
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'false' to enable write tools (default: true)

environmentVariables.name: SCHOLAR_MCP_READ_ONLY
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'false' to enable write tools (default: true)

environmentVariables.name: SCHOLAR_MCP_KV_STORE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Persistent-state backend URL for pvl-core subsystems. Schemes: file:///path (survives restarts), memory:// (dev/ephemeral).

environmentVariables.name: SCHOLAR_MCP_SERVER_NAME
environmentVariables.description: MCP server name shown to clients

environmentVariables.name: SCHOLAR_MCP_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Public base URL of this server, required for OIDC (e.g. https://mcp.example.com)

environmentVariables.name: SCHOLAR_MCP_OIDC_JWT_SIGNING_KEY
environmentVariables.description: JWT signing key — required on Linux/Docker to survive restarts (generate with: openssl rand -hex 32)
